title: COAS
description: Converter Agnostic Structure (COAS). Wraps a TAS converter design with product-level identity, commerce, qualification, and per-operating-point measured results. Mirrors the MAS/CAS/SAS/RAS pattern of inputs + payload + outputs. The TAS document embedded in `converter.tas` is the unmodified contract (no TAS schema changes); converter-level product metadata (manufacturerInfo, certifications, compliance, references, revision) lives only on COAS.converter and is intentionally absent from TAS.

inputs.description: Design contract: requirements envelope + operating points the converter must satisfy.

converter.description: The converter product: identity, commerce, qualification, and embedded TAS topology.

outputs.description: Per-operating-point measured / simulated results. Index 1:1 with inputs.operatingPoints. Each entry must be reproducibly generated by evaluating the corresponding operatingPoint against converter.tas.
